items.title: U.S. Private Auto Premiums Hit Record-High Q2 Mark
items.description: Private auto insurers in the US continued to benefit from earned-in rate increases in the second quarter and again pushed premiums to record levels. Read more here.

items.title: 5 Analysts Assess Travelers Companies: What You Need To Know
Wolfe Research Initiates Coverage of Travelers Companies (TRV) with Peer Perform Recommendation
Wall St edges lower as investors turn cautious ahead of Fed rate decision
items.description: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq eased from intraday record highs on Tuesday as caution set in ahead of an anticipated interest rate cut from the Federal Reserve on Wednesday, while declines in financial stocks weighed on the Dow.  The S&P 500 financial and utilities sectors lost 0.7% and 0.9% respectively, leading declines among peers.  Losses in Goldman Sachs and Travelers bogged down the Dow.

items.title: This Chubb Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Tuesday
Wolfe Research Initiates Coverage On Travelers Companies with Peer Perform Rating
items.description: Wolfe Research  analyst Tracy Benguigui   initiates coverage on Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Peer Perform rating.
